## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check:viewport`

## Content And Source Check

- [ ] Official sources are linked when a technical claim depends on external material.
- [ ] New content keeps the beginner-to-field-level structure.
- [ ] No login, account, cookie, or personal-data requirement was introduced.
